source_intake_record.raw_question_text: When the highest point at the center of the oil film is at a distance h = 1.2 μm from the upper surface of the glass plate (i.e., the thickness at the center is 1.2 μm), describe the observed fringe pattern. How many bright fringes can be seen? When the highest point at the center of the oil film is at a distance h = 1.2 μm from the upper surface of the glass plate (i.e., the thickness at the center is 1.2 μm), describe the observed fringe pattern. How many bright fringes can be seen?

agent_assessment.rationale: The prompt is semantically understandable: it asks for the observed fringe pattern and the number of bright fringes in an oil-film interference setup, and the image clearly conveys the geometry and meaning of h. However, some physical details needed for a fully self-contained derivation appear implicit or omitted, so the sample is understandable but not completely robust.
